product.name: York Wallcoverings NZ0780 Sea Grass Grasscloth Wallpaper, Pale Green, Cream, Beige, Tan, Brown
product.description: Natural fibers, in shades from creamy beige to chocolate, are knotted and stitched on a pastel green backdrop. The subtle contrasts create the Zen-like meditative quality we associate with a tranquil Japanese sand garden. This organic wallcovering is equally appropriate in an Asian setting, beach decor or a contemporary home.
features: Packaged and sold as a double roll
Double roll dimensions: 36" x 24 feet = 72 square feet; design repeat: n/a; design match: random
